title: Fast Get
description:
📦 Fast Get - Quick Loot & Inventory Management ⚡

body:
📦 Fast Get - Quick Loot & Inventory Management ⚡

Stop wasting time dragging and dropping items one by one! Fast Get is a Quality of Life (QoL) mod that streamlines your storage experience. Loot chests and dump your inventory instantly with a single click! 🚀

👇 Features:

📥 Get All: Instantly transfers all items from the chest to your inventory. Perfect for quick looting in dungeons! ⚔️

📤 Dump All: Rapidly deposits your inventory items into the chest. Essential for dropping off resources after a mining trip. ⛏️

🛑 Stop: Allows you to immediately cancel any ongoing item transfer. Stay in control.

⚙️ Settings: Access the configuration menu to tweak the mod to your liking.

✨ Why Install?

⏱️ Save Time: Automate the tedious process of moving stacks.

🎨 Clean UI: Blends seamlessly with the default Minecraft look.

✅ Efficient: A must-have for every organized player.
